detaileddescription.para: You can refer to the below stated example applications for more details on how to use TRNGPSV driver in various modes.
All the examples are in polled mode as this driver uses no interrupts.

sect1.title: xtrngpsv_drng_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XTrngpsv driver directly. This example demonstrates use of instantiate, reseed, generate functionalities while generating random number using DRNG mode.

sect1.title: xtrngpsv_drng_df_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XTrng driver directly. This example demonstrates use of instantiate, reseed, generate functionalities while generating random number using DRNG mode, with Derivative Function (DF).

sect1.title: xtrngpsv_ptrng_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XTrngpsv driver directly. This example demonstrates use of instantiate, generate functionalities while generating random number using PTRNG mode.

sect1.title: xtrngpsv_ptrng_df_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XTrng driver directly. This example demonstrates use of instantiate, generate functionalities while generating random number using PTRNG mode, with Derivative Function (DF).

sect1.title: xtrngpsv_hrng_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XTrngpsv driver directly. This example demonstrates use of instantiate, reseed, generate functionalities while generating random number using HRNG mode.

sect1.title: xtrngpsv_hrng_df_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XTrng driver directly. This example demonstrates use of instantiate, reseed, generate functionalities while generating random number using HRNG mode, with Derivative Function (DF).
